devdoc.details: Clean-room re-implementation of ENS's `Root` (D-06). Holds an `RNS`      registry reference (named `rns`, not `ens`, per D-11) and, once the      registry's root node `0x0` is transferred to this contract, holds the      sole privileged write path into it. TLD creation is gated by      `onlyController` (from `RNSControllable`); the locked-TLD `require` is      intentionally bare so the conformance suite's revert-without-reason      assertion passes byte-for-byte (D-07).

params.controller: The address whose controller status changed.
params.enabled: True when the address became a controller, false when        revoked.

params.label: The labelhash of the locked TLD.

params._rns: The RNS registry whose root node `0x0` this contract will own.

params.label: The labelhash of the TLD to lock.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.controller: The address to register or revoke.
params.enabled: True to register the address as a controller, false to        revoke it.

params.resolver: The resolver address to assign to the root node.

setSubnodeOwner(bytes32,address).details: Reverts (without a reason) if `label` has been permanently locked.

params.label: The labelhash of the TLD to assign.
params.owner: The address to make the owner of the TLD node.

returns._0: True if `interfaceID` is the ERC-165 meta interface id.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

ROOT_NODE.details: The registry root node — all TLDs are subnodes of `0x0`.

devdoc.title: RNSRoot — owner of the registry root node.

ControllerChanged(address,bool).notice: Emitted when a controller is registered or de-registered.

TLDLocked(bytes32).notice: Emitted when a TLD label is permanently locked.

controllers(address).notice: Whether an address is currently a registered controller.

lock(bytes32).notice: Permanently locks a TLD label so it can never be reassigned via         `setSubnodeOwner`. Owner-only. There is no unlock path.

locked(bytes32).notice: Whether a TLD label is permanently locked against reassignment.

rns().notice: The RNS registry this contract owns the root node of.

setController(address,bool).notice: Registers or de-registers a controller. Owner-only.

setResolver(address).notice: Sets the resolver of the registry root node `0x0`. Owner-only.

setSubnodeOwner(bytes32,address).notice: Creates or reassigns a top-level domain. Controller-only.

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: ERC-165 introspection — reports support for the ERC-165 meta         interface only.

userdoc.notice: The contract that owns the RNS registry root node `0x0`. It is the         sole creator of top-level domains: a controller calls         `setSubnodeOwner(label, owner)` to assign a TLD, and the owner can         permanently `lock` a label so that TLD can never be reassigned.
